creator: gustavo.scalet@collabora.com
text:
(In reply to Glen Barber from comment #8)
I thought about it, but as python2 and python3 are not compatible with each other, I'm not sure if it's a good idea to run some python.

Note: on Ubuntu1804, the python3 is the default when invoking python. That broke some userspace scripts but I can't say it's Canonical's fault.

Nevertheless, I don't think I came across a distribution that had NO link from python to python2 or python3 so that might indeed be a good idea to add that link as you suggested.
